x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf0
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Portal is a primary delivery channel for Now Assist self-service AI features. Unconfigured or inactive portals prevent Now Assist from surfacing AI search, suggested articles, and virtual agent to end users.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Service Portal Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sp_portal');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active Service Portal(s)';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active Service Portal(s) configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent can deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active Service Portals configured. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal to deliver self-service AI features to end users.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006116</number>
<order>120</order>
<remediation_guidance>Verify active Service Portals via sp_portal_list.do. Ensure Employee Center or Service Portal is configured and accessible. Now Assist AI Search and Virtual Agent require an active portal for end-user delivery.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf0</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
